title: Domains
subtitle: Add a custom domain to your store and check activation status
add_hint: Enter your root domain or a subdomain (e.g., store.example.com)
nameservers_desc: Change the Nameservers in your domain provider's panel to the following values:
ns_note: Propagation may take 24 to 48 hours after the change.
verify_desc: Once nameservers are changed, the system will automatically verify and issue an SSL certificate.
confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this domain?
empty_desc: Add your custom domain to link it to your store.
error_invalid: Please enter a valid domain (e.g., store.example.com)
docs_link: How to set up the domain?
